subject: Implement Phase 4: Model 3 - Joint Development / Cost-Sharing
body:
Add complete implementation of Model 3 with all 8 variants:
- 3A: Proportional Cost Sharing (Equal 50/50)
- 3B: Contribution-Based Sharing
- 3C: Benefit-Based Sharing
- 3D: Platform + Application Split
- 3E: Development + Commercialisation Split
- 3F: Joint Venture Entity
- 3G: Consortium / Multi-Party
- 3H: Pre-Competitive Joint Development

Key features:
- Full contribution tracking (cash, personnel, IP, facilities)
- Ownership calculation methods for each variant
- Three-perspective outputs (Developer, Buyer, Combined)
- Transfer pricing risk assessment for cost-contribution arrangements
- No intercompany profit - clean consolidation benefit
- Amortisation schedules and tax calculations
title: Implement Phase 4: Model 3 - Joint Development / Cost-Sharing
